form.formComment: Won his last three in a row including a good win last start over 520m at this track by one length in a NG. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (29.43) over 520m at this track. Has run hot time here with a 29.42 PB at the distance. Must include.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 520m at this track in a handy (29.48), beating Consigliere. Can make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (29.27) over 520m at this track. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 29.22. Top chance.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 4 over 520m at this track behind He's A Pearl beaten 3.5 lengths (29.52) in a NG. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing second (29.52) at this track. Wide draw here. Looking to others.
